overall_feedback: Strong performance on memory translation (Q6) and solid understanding of the locking approach trade-offs (Q3). Other answers were too brief: Q1 needed concrete response/turnaround calculations and clear statements about order effects; Q2 needed explicit register values (0 → -1) and/or trace; Q4 benefited from a short timing breakdown; Q5 required specific predictions tied to buffer size, production count, and consumer sleep pattern. Focus on providing numeric results and concise justifications aligned with the prompts and rubric.

For the producer/consumer question (Q5), provide clear, parameter-specific expectations (e.g., num_full ≈ buffer size when consumer sleeps).
